identity.mission: Create a 'Modern Indian Luxury' aesthetic that blends Swiss precision with Indian warmth.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix minimalist tech with opulent imagery.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel like a concierge service.
Content is King: Venue photos are the hero; UI recedes.
Negative Space: Use 'Bone' (#F9F9F7) backgrounds to let content breathe.

headings.usage: Hero titles, Venue names, Key marketing statements.
headings.rules: Use tracking-tight for sizes over 32px. Capitalize carefully.

body.usage: UI text, descriptions, forms, dashboard data.

mono.usage: Reference numbers, prices in tables, technical data.

primary.description: Deep Navy - Authority, Trust, Night Sky.

background.description: Bone/Off-White. Never use pure white #FFFFFF for main background, only for cards.

accent.description: Pale Gold/Beige - For subtle highlights and secondary backgrounds.

rules: Gold (#C9A227) is for accents only (buttons, icons, borders). Never backgrounds.
Use Navy (#0B1F3B) for primary actions and solid headers.
Asymmetry in venue lists to avoid visual fatigue.
Cardless design preference or very subtle borders.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B1F3B] text-white hover:bg-[#153055] rounded-none px-8 py-6 font-medium tracking-wide transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-[#0B1F3B] text-[#0B1F3B] hover:bg-[#0B1F3B] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-6 transition-all

cards.venue_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 border border-transparent hover:border-[#C9A227]/30
cards.dashboard_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-none rounded-sm p-6

inputs.style: rounded-none border-slate-300 focus:border-[#0B1F3B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0B1F3B] bg-[#F9F9F7] px-4 py-3

textures.noise: Use a subtle noise overlay on the #0B1F3B sections to make them feel like 'expensive paper' or 'fabric'.

wedding_venues.description: Red and white floral sofa set - Mandap setting
White and pink floral stage - Elegant setup
Room filled with white couches - Lounge area

corporate_venues.description: Ornate room with colorful walls - Premium conference
Large room with chandelier - Luxury ballroom

party_venues.description: Night time view of building with lights - Rooftop party

people.description: Woman in red and blue shirt smiling - Planner
Man with arms crossed smiling - Venue Owner

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT use standard 'Shadcn' radius (0.5rem). Override to '0px' or '2px' for that sharp, premium architectural look.
Use the supplied 'wedding_venues' images for the Landing Page Hero slider.
Implement 'Glassmorphism' on the sticky header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20.
For the 'Enquiry Form', use a clean, single-column layout with floating labels.
Commission Tracking Dashboard must use the 'High Density' grid. No wasted space.
Use 'Playfair Display' for all Section Headings (H1, H2). Use 'Manrope' for everything else.
When displaying prices, format as '₹ 1,00,000' (Indian numbering system).
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
